design_philosophy.core_loop: Select transmission type, navigate three circuit tracks with increasing difficulty, compete against AI opponents in Formula One racing
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Precision driving mechanics balanced against arcade accessibility; maintaining racing line while managing speed through varied track layouts
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Experience authentic Formula One racing with multiple perspective options and transmission choices
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Pioneering 3D polygon graphics approach emphasizing visual fidelity over simulation depth; offering player agency through view selection (4 camera modes) and transmission types rather than heavy customization

difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Three difficulty circuits available (Beginner: Big Forest, Intermediate: Bay Bridge, Expert: Acropolis); player selects transmission type pre-race

progression.unlock_mechanism: Three difficulty-based circuits with distinct track layouts and environmental features
replayability_hooks: Four different camera view options to alter racing perspective
Multiple transmission types affecting handling characteristics
Arcade cabinet support for up to 8-player linked competition
Each circuit features unique environmental storytelling (amusement park in Big Forest, Bay Bridge landmark, Acropolis hairpin turn)

world_building_techniques: Distinct circuit environments with recognizable landmarks (amusement park, bridge infrastructure, tight mountain roads)
Track-specific architectural features defining difficulty progression
Implied Formula One racing context through car selection and transmission options

faction_indicators: Single-player vs. multiplayer competitive racing splits player base
Arcade cabinet variants (Twin, DX, Formula) suggest different player communities by venue investment level
danger_signals: Arcade deluxe cabinet with force-feedback steering and airbags creates skill gatekeeping through hardware
Expert circuit (Acropolis) with tight hairpin turns may frustrate newcomers to 3D racing genre
environmental_storytelling: Big Forest: amusement park setting suggests accessible, leisure-oriented racing
Bay Bridge: landmark infrastructure suggests realistic urban racing context
Acropolis: tight hairpin turns communicate technical difficulty through geography
